title: Transform data.json into summary.json
instruction: Read data.json (an array of orders). Write summary.json with exactly this shape: {"orderCount": <number of orders>, "totalCents": <sum of amountCents over all orders>, "byStatus": {"<status>": <count>, ...}}. Statuses in byStatus must be the ones that actually appear in the data. Use compact or pretty JSON, either is fine.
